title: Final Flag or Climax TBTL Reversal

cases.raw_text_excerpt: Consecutive Sell Climax: Often Caused by Option Firms Sell Climaxes slightly different from Buy Climaxes Most firms prefer to buy value Fewer are willing to buy strong rallies Buy
pattern_decision_points: Match the Brooks v2 chart context before treating the setup as mechanically testable.
Confirm the pattern geometry before translating it into OHLCV approximation rules.
Look for late-trend final flag or climax behavior, then require a reversal entry with follow-through.
Treat TBTL as a testing and review hypothesis, not a standalone entry without context.
disqualifiers: Climax continues as a strong trend without reversal follow-through.
Countertrend entry before the trend shows exhaustion.
cases.ohlcv_approximation_risk: High visual dependency: OHLCV can approximate sequence and extremes, but cannot confirm drawn channel quality, trapped-trader context, or chart readability without image review.
